metadata.description: Rob Sherman's public Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: honcho
plugins.description: Persistent memory for Claude Code sessions using Honcho (cfdude fork: project-level .honcho.json workspace override enabling work/personal workspace separation)

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: Project-management conductor above OpenSpec and Superpowers: tracks proposals as epics, maintains an explicit detour stack, and enforces a reconcile gate so nothing is lost when development pivots or context is compacted.

plugins.name: directory-tree
plugins.description: Generate and optimize a project's directory_tree.md by running a bundled, .gitignore-aware tree script and suggesting .gitignore improvements to keep the tree small.
